protocolObjects.name: GoalOSCommit
protocolObjects.purpose: Signed institutional aim: objective, constraints, authority, risk, budget, evaluators, rollback obligations.
protocolObjects.privateCounterpart: Full objective context, private documents, privileged constraints.

protocolObjects.name: RunCommitment
protocolObjects.purpose: Execution contract: agent set, artifact versions, tool permissions, context roots, policies, runtime limits.
protocolObjects.privateCounterpart: Complete traces, raw logs, sensitive tool outputs.

protocolObjects.name: ProofPacket
protocolObjects.purpose: Attestable record of execution: trace root, output hash, evals, policy decisions, costs, signatures.
protocolObjects.privateCounterpart: Evidence Docket private appendix and evaluator workpapers.

protocolObjects.name: SelectionCertificate
protocolObjects.purpose: Decision object: admit, reject, canary, promote, pause, or roll back a candidate upgrade.

protocolObjects.name: RolloutReceipt
protocolObjects.purpose: Scoped release record with monitoring thresholds, percentage, safety thresholds, and signer.

protocolObjects.name: RollbackReceipt
protocolObjects.purpose: Recovery record for trigger, rollback target, incident root, and current rollback status.

gates.label: Schema-valid
gates.explain: Objects validate against the AEP-style object vocabulary.

gates.label: Proof-valid
gates.explain: Execution emits an inspectable proof packet and evidence pointer.

gates.label: Eval-gated
gates.explain: Registered evals and baseline comparisons are present.

gates.label: Risk-bounded
gates.explain: Safety, legal, security, and privacy risks are within scope.

gates.label: Public/private boundary
gates.explain: Public proof is minimal; private intelligence is not exposed.

gates.label: Rollback-ready
gates.explain: Valid rollback target and recovery condition are defined.

gates.label: Challenge window
gates.explain: Review, replay, and dispute window exist before propagation.

gates.label: Human-reviewed
gates.explain: Human or institutional approval is required before authority.

scenarios.title: Autonomous website publication
scenarios.objective: Publish a public-safe GoalOS page from source only after automation, claim-boundary, and human-review gates pass.

scenarios.title: AGI job settlement
scenarios.objective: Move one bounded machine-work job from request to proof, validation, settlement posture, and Chronicle entry.

scenarios.title: Capability upgrade right
scenarios.objective: Evaluate whether a reusable artifact earns a scoped upgrade right after proof, canary, challenge, and rollback checks.

scenarios.title: Public claim boundary
scenarios.objective: Decide whether a strong claim can be published, revised, quarantined, or rejected under Evidence Docket discipline.
